title: [FIRRTL] AdvancedLayerSink: clone ref ops into layerblocks
body:
- Run advanced layer sink (ALS) before lower-XMR
  - Lower-XMR will place symbols on probed objects, which will prevent ALS from sinking these objects into layers
  - By moving ALS before lower-XMR, ALS is more able to sink objects into layers.
  - With this change, ALS will encounter ref ops, not XMR ops.
- In ALS, clone ref ops into layerblocks
  - Ensures that we will sink ref resolve ops as deep as possible, even if there exists no LCA layerblock.
  - Add ALS test for this behaviour
- Add end-to-end test checking that a probed node does not result in "residue" in the module body.



Fixes: https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/8560
